title: Advanced snapping framework and indicators
description: Implement a robust, extensible snapping system for surface anchors, fractional face guides, feature/edge anchors, and clear indicator lines. This umbrella tracks architecture, staged delivery, QA, and docs for the full snapping feature set.

title: Add integration drag/snap tests for real interaction flows
description: Add integration tests covering pointer drag flows for part and group snapping across new anchor types, including indicator correctness and overlap-policy compatibility. Include regression cases from user-reported scenarios.

title: Documentation and in-app guidance for advanced snapping
description: Update docs and help content to explain new snap behaviors, indicators, and settings. Add concise in-app hints/tooltips so designers can discover center/quarter-line snaps without friction.

title: Define snap taxonomy, priorities, and indicator language
description: Specify canonical snap types (face, center-1D, center-2D, edge-to-midline, edge-to-quarterline, vertex/edge variants, equal spacing), per-axis arbitration priorities, and visual indicator semantics (color, style, label, precedence). Output is an implementation spec used by all downstream tasks.

title: Implement surface anchor snaps (center-1D, center-2D, edge-to-midline, edge-to-quarterline)
description: Add tangential surface-anchor snap detection on top of face-flush contact: center in one axis, center in two axes, edge aligned to face midline, and edge aligned to quarter-lines. Ensure these work for rotated parts and preserve smooth face-latched sliding.

title: Implement fractional face grid anchors (0/25/50/75/100)
description: Generate and evaluate virtual anchor lines on target faces at configurable fractions. Support one-axis and two-axis snap combinations and preserve existing snap arbitration behavior. Include opt-in setting for advanced fractions if needed later.

title: Build indicator rendering system for snap candidates and winners
description: Implement a consistent indicator layer for snapping: candidate vs winning lines, axis-aware styling, dashed quarter-lines, centerline markers, and short labels near cursor. Ensure indicators are non-interactive and do not interfere with raycasting or dragging.

title: Extend snap arbitration and hysteresis for advanced anchors
description: Update per-axis snap arbitration to handle new anchor snap types with stable precedence and hysteresis. Prevent oscillation between similar candidates and preserve smooth tangential slide while face-latched.

title: Add snap settings UI and presets for advanced snapping
description: Expose settings to enable/disable anchor families, adjust sensitivity, and choose indicator verbosity (winners only vs show candidates). Provide sensible presets: Simple, Precision, Layout.

title: Add performance instrumentation and budgets for snapping
description: Instrument snap detection and indicator rendering cost in drag loops. Add performance budgets and guardrails to keep interaction smooth with many parts/groups. Optimize candidate pruning and early exits where needed.

title: Comprehensive unit tests for advanced snap detectors
description: Add deterministic tests for surface anchors, quarter-lines, centerline snaps, edge/vertex interactions, and arbitration precedence. Include scenario fixtures for rotated parts and face-latched sliding without regressions.
